Docs.summary: A class representing a DataProtectionDeletedBackupVault along with the instance operations that can be performed on it. If you have a you can construct a from an instance of using the GetResource method. Otherwise you can get one from its parent resource using the GetDataProtectionDeletedBackupVaults method.
